title: neocheiropteris ovata f. doryopteris
intro: Neocheiropteris ovata f. doryopteris, also known as the Doryopteris fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris ovata f. doryopteris include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
